R36S_V20_2025_05_18_3.arkosRecommendation: Clone R36s -> Clone R36s -> Clone Type 3 Panel 1

tips.zh: 克隆系列中最不推荐的版本，使用的是屏蔽坏道的1G，原始系统硬编码965M，重置后可显示1200M，实际上只有750M。
tips.en: Least recommended clone version. Uses 1GB with masked bad sectors. Shows 965M originally, 1200M after reset, but actually only 750M.

R36S_V20_2025_05_18_2.arkosRecommendation: Clone R36s -> Clone R36s -> Clone Type 3 Panel 2

tips.zh: 自带dtb性能羸弱，酱油的每一次版本迭代都是在降低成本。
tips.en: Stock DTB has weak performance. Each Soy Sauce iteration reduces costs.
